why: Products cannot go live without images, and there is no way to upload image files — only text path entry exists. This blocks the entire XA catalog publish workflow for any product that does not already have externally-hosted images.

intended_outcome.statement: Vendors can upload product images directly to R2 via the xa-uploader console. Products saved with data only remain draft; adding images makes them publish-ready. All within Cloudflare free tier.
